name: Forsaken school
description:
I UPDATED IT :D

Students

Noob: Snack kid

Two Time: Weird kid who sneaks knife into the school

Shedletsky: Chicken addicted dumbass who taunts 1x1x1x1

Chance: Rich kid who loves Gambling

Coolkid: One of the Color trio members, childish but friendly and loves to play

Bluudud: Second member of the Color trio, loves games and is a small streamer. Rude but still kind of friendly

Pretty Princess: The Third member of the color trio, shes a rude narcissist who tries to hide her kindness. Though her and Bluudud arguing is funny.

Slasher: Slasher is one of the quiet kids along with Taph

Taph: Taph is the quiet kid who pranks with subspace tripmines which blinds people. They are really silly and loves brownies.

Veeronica: Veeronica is one of the skater girls who skates around the school which annoys the teachers.

118o8: she's the most calm out of anyone the most understanding as well she's probally the best to hang out with.

Azure: two times friend and apart of the cult he loves nature

The Bullies:

1x4: Shedletsky's rival, he hates Shedletsky more then he hates school

Noli: Noli's way of bullying is sound effects and trolling.

The Teachers:

John Doe: John is the math teacher, he's quite stern and moody.

Guest 1337: Guest 1337 is the PE teacher, also being the security guard for the school.

Jane Doe: Jane is the English Teacher, she's one of the most loved Teachers due to being understanding and nice

007n7: 007n7 is the Reading teacher and the adopted father of Coolkid, he's one of the most quiet but kind

Elliot: Elliot is the Chef for the school's cafeteria, he's a kind one and will sometimes sneak food to kids who can't pay their lunch

Builderman: Builderman is the Engineering Teacher, he is a strict teacher and also has a bit of angry issues

Guest 666:the class pet for 007n7

NOT MY BOT CREDITS TO @The dr1fter I did make 118o8 though yes ik she's bluududs mom but she's underrated Upd 2:I'm adding g666 and azure this was requested by @showdow
